{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Rose power of healing
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] can call forth a rose power of healing that manifests as a pale reddish light.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The rose power of healing is tiring for [[Alin]] to use.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
